name: io.github.schoasch/skill-backtesting-arena
description: Programmatic crypto market-cycle scoring, on-chain indicators, and aggregated strategy insights. ~60 MCP tools across daily snapshots (Arena Pulse, BTC Cycle, Fear & Greed, Mayer Multiple, Hash Ribbons, Funding Rate, Bullmarket Ampel, Altcoin Season), historical series, on-chain BRK data, strategy/filter/volatility insights, backtest triggers (Pro+), and live subscriptions. Same Bearer key works for REST + MCP.
